subject: [PATCH v2 055/110] fscrypt: use PRIino format for i_ino

reviews.author: Jeff Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch uses PRIino format for i_ino in printk statements, but this may cause issues if the inode number is too large to fit into a long integer.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the fscrypt code to use the PRIino format macro for printing inode numbers, which will be widened in a future change via the kino_t type. The changes affect several files and involve replacing hardcoded inode number formats with the new macro. This is done in preparation for the widening of inode numbers, allowing for larger values to be represented.
